entries.title: odoo-ai-skills
entries.description: The local-first verification & deploy gate for AI-written Odoo 17/18/19 changes — static indexes suggest; this verifies against the running instance. Read ground truth from the live instance first (fields, MRO/super chains, views, security, runtime flow, runtime state + exception post-mortem, reverse field impact, effective per-user/company security, module load state), build the smallest correct change, prove it with tests, and review it before merge — never guess. Layer-K discovery solves the cold-start problem — rank the live entrypoint surface (buttons/crons/automations/routes), sample the real cross-app flow as an Execution Surface Graph, measure hallucination reduction against a benchmark, and ENFORCE no-introspect-no-edit via a PreToolUse hook. Layer-I enforcement gates turn that evidence into proof: risk-based scenario test generation, dev-vs-prod environment parity, a static anti-pattern validator, enforced privacy redaction, an upgrade/migration harness, a deploy approval gate, a one-command evidence bundle (PR-comment verdict), and a bring-your-own-index claim verifier; plus a local Odoo developer-docs index (Layer J). No SaaS, no seats, no metadata leaves the box. Covers models, scaffolding, views, OWL, public web (controllers/website/portal), security, reports, data, migration, performance, deploy (incl. odoo.sh), and domain playbooks.

entries.title: effort-gate
entries.description: Universal EFFORT standing-order for Claude Code. Injects a full effort doctrine at SessionStart and re-asserts it every turn so the agent works each task to done-and-proven — refusing unnatural, slop, mean-reverting premature exits. In-generation governance, caveman-pattern, no post-turn detection.

entries.title: dev-loop
entries.description: A multi-agent software delivery loop coordinated through ticket state. PM, QA, Dev, Sweep, Reflect, Ops, Architect, and Communication cover product discovery, testing, implementation, hygiene, retrospectives, production watch, technical-health audits, and public article drafts. The optional senior/junior Dev split lets a stronger model design while a cheaper model implements. Coordination can run on Linear, a local file board, or the service hub with per-agent identity, a localhost web UI, documents, Lark/Slack channel, one-way Linear mirror, Codex/opencode portability, and a built-in scheduler that shells out to Claude or Codex without relying on /loop.

entries.description: Turn .md, .txt, or code files into trustworthy reveal.js slide presentations via a deterministic knowledge graph + judge agent workflow.

entries.title: keel
entries.description: Foundation-first autonomous build workflow for Claude Code: spec the foundation, build feature-by-feature, gate every milestone with independent verification and a commit-pinned record. Stack-neutral — each project derives its own verification profile.

entries.description: Reviews an AI-generated implementation plan before execution: detects missing/out-of-order steps, nonexistent libraries, irreversible operations, ambiguous instructions, and stack mismatches, then issues a pass/fail verdict.

entries.title: humanizer
entries.description: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text, making it sound more natural and human. Based on Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing" guide.

entries.title: claudepress
entries.description: Universal WordPress/WooCommerce starter kit: a premium art-directed design system (Terra default + 6 directions), interactive setup skill, security-first hooks, a frontend-design commit skill, a Playwright design-review hard-fail gate and Opus 4.8 agents.

entries.description: Quality Enforcement Layer for Claude Code — Hook-gated SDD (spec & plan vehicles), Wave commits, and grounded multi-agent code review.

entries.title: amplemarket
entries.description: Sales and GTM skills for prospecting, account research, pipeline review, coaching, deliverability, and outreach. Requires the Amplemarket MCP server or connector.

entries.title: claude-intercom
entries.description: Message-passing between independent Claude Code sessions running in WezTerm panes, addressed by role. One agent can hand work to another (e.g. a frontend session tells the backend session to expose an API) and the peer acts on it.

entries.title: team-memory
entries.description: File-based project memory for Claude Code: durable knowledge with verification anchors, loaded at session start and recalled on demand. Includes /save, /recall, /memory-sweep and the SessionStart hooks that wire it together.

entries.title: exa
entries.description: Exa AI web search, deep research, and content extraction. Provides MCP tools and research skills for comprehensive web search, people discovery, company research, academic papers, and more.

entries.title: nethook
entries.description: A NetHack-style ASCII fishing roguelike to play in a second terminal window while Claude Code is busy. /gofish opens it; a hook pings you when Claude is done. Generate playable real-world fishing spots with /nethook:spot.

entries.title: bob
entries.description: Delegate a build task to bob — an autonomous build→verify→judge loop that drives opencode + abe in an isolated worktree, gated on your tests. Exposes a `build` MCP tool, /bob:build, and a delegation skill.

entries.title: ollama-cloud-usage
entries.description: Show Ollama Cloud 5-hour and weekly quota usage in the Claude Code statusline. Mirrors the pi-ollama-usage extension for the pi coding agent. Zero-config reuses pi-ollama-usage session cookie when present.

entries.title: ask
entries.description: Agent-to-human request inbox. A single-binary inbox designed for AI coding agents to file requests for actions only a human can take — set up an OAuth credential, sign into a service, click around a feature and provide feedback, copy a file to a path the agent can't reach. Items live as plain JSON files in .ask/ inside any project. No server, no database, no schema setup.

entries.description: Agentic software engineering skills for grilling plans, domain modeling, and writing effective reusable skills.

entries.title: bps-compliance
entries.description: Building Performance Standards compliance — Local Law 97 NYC penalty calculator, BEPS ordinance tracking, compliance deadline alerts, and fine mitigation strategies across US/Canada/EU jurisdictions.

entries.title: keyhole
entries.description: Hand a secret to your AI coding agent through a localhost form — the value reaches a store by reference and never enters the chat context

entries.title: seo-aeo
entries.description: Make any site rank in Google AND get cited by AI answer engines, then auto-publish an optimized article every 1-2 weeks. Orchestrator skill /seo-aeo plus 7 gated task skills (discover, measure, on-site fix, build blog, engine, verify).

entries.title: dq-toolkit
entries.description: Local code + documentation search — one SQLite store (code.db) over your repos and library docs, queried by Claude through the dq-sql CLI (SQLite FTS5 with porter stemming)

entries.description: AI memory layer for fractional CMOs. Remembers every client detail across conversations.

entries.title: dolt-mcp-vcs
entries.description: Dolt/DoltHub version-control toolkit for Claude Code, via the dolthub/dolt-mcp server. A version-control-surface skill + expert agents over a Dolt backend — diagnosing DoltHub visibility, taming server sprawl, auditing the graph, and recovering incidents — with a verb-class mutation gate that keeps destructive ops (push/merge/reset/branch-delete) recommend-only. Ships the beads (bd) task-tracker as use-case adapter #1 today; evolving to a dialect-invariant core with thin flavor adapters (Dolt/Doltgres/DoltLite/DumboDB). Formerly `beads-dolt`.

entries.title: fusebase-flow

Two agents (Product Owner + AI Developer) run a disciplined spec-to-deploy lifecycle, packaged with FuseBase Apps domain skills. Closes the gaps that break real AI app development: drift, context rot, scope creep, unreliable hand-offs.

entries.title: healer
entries.description: Universal Development Lifecycle Engine — 44 commands, 27 flow presets, Karpathy enforcement (P2 Simplicity + P3 Surgical HARD-GATEs), Deep-Research + Options-First Protocol (8-category research matrix, max-choice candidate counts, HTML gallery for UI picks), postfix `?` and `--help` discoverability, self-validating command catalog with auto-rebuild hook, 10x imitate (5-layer reverse-engineering with 4-in-1 output + Style DNA YAML) & flow testing, /healer:adapt replicator consuming Style DNA deterministically (PC/VM/CH/IC/BR/CV/AR/MD deep-style capture), design intelligence with 161 palettes, 57 fonts, and 99 UX guidelines.

entries.description: Complete set of Twilio skills. Covers Setup, Planner, Product, and Guardrail skills across SMS, Voice, WhatsApp, AI agents, Conversation Orchestrator, and 30+ products.

entries.title: acp-find
entries.description: The trust + intelligence layer for the Virtuals Protocol ACP marketplace — search, evaluate, and orchestrate on-chain agents, and know which are REAL. v0.18.0 tiers the tools: a lean 20-tool CORE (search + trust) is the default for the remote endpoint and bare npx, while the full 47-tool surface is opt-in via ACP_FIND_TIER=full (this plugin runs FULL). v0.17.0 adds a remote Streamable-HTTP MCP endpoint (add it by URL, no install) and makes the trust verdict authoritative across the plugin, the website report, and an embeddable by-address badge. v0.16.4 weights acp_agent_trust by DISTINCT organic buyers (N completions from one buyer no longer reads like N from many; the headline + delivery lane disclose organicDistinctBuyers and the score dampens single-buyer concentration). v0.16.3 documents the marketplace-gap↔categories reconciliation fields (totalAllMarketplaces/denominatorNote/countScope). v0.16.2 hardens acp_agent_trust so VERIFIED requires a genuine third-party buyer (excludes the operator's own portfolio wallets, so self-dogfooding can't earn VERIFIED). v0.16.0 adds acp_agent_trust (a one-call VERIFIED/OPERATIONAL/UNVERIFIED/SUSPECT/LIKELY_CLONE verdict fusing clone-screening, SecurityBot grade, and official-indexer completed-jobs-by-distinct-counterparties — the anti-self-loop signal), de-blinds acp_agent_verify onto the official Virtuals indexer, and adds opt-in inline trust on acp_find/acp_search_agents. Plus semantic V1+V2 search, REAL V2 transactions (acp_v2_transactions/acp_agent_jobs/acp_v2_demand), Degen Arena overlap, risk scoring (0-100, A-F), SecurityBot scanning, marketplace gap analysis, and one-call composites — backed by the public api.acp-metabot.dev gateway. Use it without leaving Claude Code.

entries.title: langfuse
entries.description: Skills for working with Langfuse, the open-source LLM engineering platform for tracing, prompt management, and evaluation.

entries.title: bharats-claude-toolkit
entries.description: Bharat's personal Claude Code setup, packaged as a plugin + marketplace: 116 vendored skills and 4 agents spanning engineering, AI, product, design, copy/UX, go-to-market, marketing, and enterprise & ops, plus a curated always-on plugin tier and an on-demand firehose one command away.

entries.title: lsp-refactor
entries.description: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entries.title: m3
entries.description: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entries.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entries.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls
